name_cn:
Premium Grade Fendi Replica
💗 Iconic small Mon Tresor bucket bag, new proportions, convenient for carrying essentials. Original color raffia weave material. Brown leather FENDI Roma lettering. Lined with gold-finish metal hardware. Accented with brown leather details. One long and one short detachable shoulder strap, can be worn over the shoulder or crossbody.
12.14.18cm
277
